name: Nostr Relay
description: Backup all your Nostr activity with your private relay
compose:
name: slashnode-nostr-relay
services:
  web:
    image: getumbrel/umbrel-nostr-relay:v1.1.0
    container_name: nostr-relay-web
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    environment:
      RELAY_HOST: nostr-relay-relay
      RELAY_PORT: '8080'
      RELAY_PROXY_HOST: nostr-relay-relay-proxy
      RELAY_PROXY_PORT: '80'
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:4848:3000
  relay:
    image: getumbrel/nostr-rs-relay:0.8.1
    container_name: nostr-relay-relay
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    volumes:
      - relay_data-relay-config.toml:/app/config.toml
      - relay_data-relay-db:/app/db
  relay-proxy:
    image: getumbrel/umbrel-nostr-relay-proxy:v1.1.0
    container_name: nostr-relay-relay-proxy
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    depends_on:
      - relay
    environment:
      RELAY_HOST: nostr-relay-relay
      RELAY_PORT: '8080'
    volumes:
      - relay-proxy_data-relay-proxy:/app/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  relay_data-relay-config.toml:
    name: slashnode-nostr-relay_relay_data-relay-config.toml
  relay_data-relay-db:
    name: slashnode-nostr-relay_relay_data-relay-db
  relay-proxy_data-relay-proxy:
    name: slashnode-nostr-relay_relay-proxy_data-relay-proxy
